tool.list_agents.desc: List all configured backend A2A agents and their current health status.
tool.health_check.desc: Return overall system health including active streams and uptime.
tool.get_blocked_requests.desc: Retrieve requests blocked by the security pipeline within a time window.
tool.get_agent_card.desc: Retrieve the Agent Card for a specific backend agent.
tool.get_aggregated_card.desc: Retrieve the aggregated Agent Card published by the sentinel gateway.
tool.get_rate_limit_status.desc: Retrieve current rate-limit status for all agents.
tool.update_rate_limit.desc: Update the rate limit (requests per minute) for a specific agent.
tool.register_agent.desc: Register a new backend A2A agent with the gateway.
tool.deregister_agent.desc: Remove a backend A2A agent from the gateway.
tool.send_test_message.desc: Send a test message to a specific agent and return the response.
tool.list_policies.desc: List all configured ABAC access control policies and their match conditions.
tool.evaluate_policy.desc: Evaluate what policy decision would be made for a given set of request attributes.
tool.list_pending_changes.desc: List all pending Agent Card changes awaiting approval.
tool.approve_card_change.desc: Approve a pending Agent Card change and apply the new card.
tool.reject_card_change.desc: Reject a pending Agent Card change, keeping the old card.
param.since.desc: RFC3339 timestamp to filter from (optional, defaults to last hour)
param.limit.desc: Maximum number of results to return (optional, defaults to 100)
param.agent_name.desc: Name of the agent to update
param.default.desc: Whether this agent should be the default route (optional)
param.text.desc: Text content of the test message
param.agent_name_card.desc: Name of the agent whose card to retrieve
res.config.name: Sentinel Configuration
res.config.desc: Current gateway configuration with secrets masked.
res.metrics.name: Request Metrics
res.metrics.desc: Basic request metrics including total requests, blocked count, active streams, and uptime.
res.agent_detail.name: Agent Detail
res.agent_detail.desc: Per-agent detail including status, card, and skills. Replace {name} with agent name.
res.security.name: Security Report
res.security.desc: Security summary including auth mode, rate limit status, and recent blocks count.
err.write_token_not_configured: MCP auth token not configured: write operations are disabled
err.write_token_required: Unauthorized: valid Bearer token required for write operations
err.agent_name_required_in_uri: agent name required in URI: sentinel://agents/{name}
sentinel.forbidden.hint: Check agent permissions and scope configuration
sentinel.rate_limited.hint: Wait before retrying. Configure security.rate_limit in sentinel.yaml
sentinel.stream_limit.hint: Max streams per agent reached. Configure agents[].max_streams
sentinel.replay.hint: Request ID already seen within replay window. Use unique IDs for each request.
sentinel.ssrf.hint: URL resolves to private network. Use public URLs or configure security.push.allowed_domains
sentinel.invalid_request.hint: Check A2A protocol specification for correct message format
sentinel.no_route.hint: Check routing path or set a default agent
sentinel.global_limit.hint: Gateway is at maximum connections. Try again shortly
